cn.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

cn.trackName: AMood - 你的健康生活好伙伴
cn.releaseNotes:
AMood 现已全面适配 iOS 26 与 watchOS 26，带来更沉浸、更个性化，也更实用的情绪与健康体验。
本次更新包括：

• 情绪收集罐焕新升级：新增更生动的物理效果，并加入星星、海洋贝壳、糖果等更多主题，让每一份情绪都被温柔收藏，更轻松关注自己的情绪变化。
• 支持自定义表盘主题与手机主屏背景：自由打造专属风格，还可以分享给好友，一起发现更有趣的表达方式。
• 支持更换 App 图标：让 AMood 更贴合你的审美与使用习惯。
• 健康习惯页新增统计功能：记录不止于打卡，帮助你更清晰地看见坚持带来的变化。
• 支持自定义健康习惯：无论是作息、饮水还是运动，都能按自己的节奏灵活管理。
• 主页身体指标新增趋势分析：更直观地了解身体状态变化，帮助你更好地觉察日常节律。
• 睡眠可视化进一步增强：新增入睡时间统计，以更直观的方式帮助你了解睡眠习惯，逐步获得更优质的睡眠。
• 健康习惯页顶部交互优化：现已支持左右手势快捷切换，操作更流畅、更顺手。
• 整体交互体验持续优化：多个细节改进与问题修复，带来更稳定、更顺畅的使用体验。
cn.description:
欢迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好伙伴。无感追踪你的心理状态和身体压力，快捷查看睡眠、基础代谢、饮水、咖啡因摄入等健康指标，帮助你掌握身体动态，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何帮助到你

在这个快节奏的时代，我们常常像陀螺一样不停旋转，却忽视了倾听内心的声音。疲惫与焦虑悄然袭来，却难以言说原因。我们相信，了解身心状态是每个人找到理想生活节奏的关键。AMood 正是秉持这一理念，通过更精准的分析，帮助你更好地照顾自己。例如：

- 当你忙于赶项目，连续工作数小时，软件会通过手表提醒你身体活力下降，泡杯热茶，活动一下身体；

- 当你开完一整天的会议，感到焦虑不安时，软件同样会提醒你情绪指数偏低，让你意识到需要暂时停下来，也许走出去晒晒太阳，散散步，都是不错的选择； 

- 早晨醒来感到郁闷，打开软件发现情绪指数偏低，原来昨晚的睡眠质量不佳。今天可能需要多晒晒太阳或者中午小睡一会，让身心重新焕发光彩；

- 查看本周趋势，发现每次与好友一起运动后，情绪指数都会明显上扬。这或许是生活给我们的一个小提示：快乐往往藏在简单的事物中；

- 当工作压力大时，查看身心状态日历，寻找最适合自己的黄金时段。在对的时间做对的事，让效率与健康齐头并进。

◎ 核心功能

过去，压力常通过单一的 HRV 指标衡量，但生活远比数字复杂。AMood 首创双维度分析，独立监测身体压力和心理状态，帮助您更精准地识别身心变化，找到最适合的调节方式。

- 双维监测：独立追踪身体活力与情绪波动，提供更精准的分析

- 全域数据：整合睡眠、心率、体温、日照、步态等信息，全面了解身体状态

- 智能提醒：实时监测身心状态变化，适时提醒休息与调整

- 趋势洞察：帮助您发现最佳作息与工作节奏

- 习惯养成：记录运动、饮水、咖啡因摄入等行为，助力健康管理

- 联名主题：多个 IP 正版授权，增添健康管理的乐趣与互动

AMood 不仅关注单一时刻，更致力于发现生活中的规律。通过分析睡眠、心率、体温等多维数据，描绘出你独特的生命韵律。每一组数据背后，都蕴藏着提升生活品质的秘密。因为我们深信，照顾自己这段旅程，理应充满温暖与愉悦。

◎ 苹果健康集成

AMood 与 Apple Health 集成，需要授予苹果健康的读取和写入权限。

◎ 订阅价格和条款

我们提供一次性购买、按月和按年自动续订三种不同的购买选项。按月或按年订阅的说明：确认并支付后，将通过你的苹果 iTunes 账号自动续订。扣费成功后，顺延一个订阅周期。若需退订，请在当前订阅期结束前至少24小时内，手动在 iTunes / Apple ID 设置管理中关闭自动续费功能。试用期内，如不取消订阅，则会在试用期结束时自动开通订阅并扣款。本服务由您自助选择是否取消，若您选择不取消，将为您开通下一个计费周期的续费服务。

◎ 隐私保护

用户健康数据仅储存在本地以及用户所属的iCloud中。

◎ 免责声明

AMood不是医疗设备，不能用于诊断、治疗、预防疾病或医疗状况，所提供的所有信息和建议不可以被视作医疗建议或诊断，请勿替代专业的诊断和治疗。因此，如果您担心自己的身体和(或)心理健康，请咨询医生。

◎ 用户协议和隐私条款

用户协议 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隐私条款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

cn.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

hk.description:
--

獲獎：
● 日本 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT | 官方入選
● 韓國 2020 釜山獨立遊戲節 (BIC Fest) | 最佳休閒獎
● 台灣 2020 巴哈姆特 ACG 創作大賽 | 銅賞

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

遊戲特色：
● 地城+解謎+倉庫番
● 150 個精心設計的關卡
● 地城氛圍的像素美術
● 非線性地城地圖

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

潛入深海、製作裝備、駕駛潛艇，並巧妙應對野生生物，探索茂密的珊瑚礁、火山、洞穴系統等多樣環境——同時努力生存下去。揭開這個充滿生物世界的神祕面紗，這些生物有的親近友好，有的則充滿敵意，且到處散落著過去的線索。

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色
• 求生——在廣大的水下星球迫降後，時間緊迫，必須尋找水和食物，並開發裝備來探索這個世界。
• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？
• 自訂——在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

hk.releaseNotes:
AMood 現已全面適配 iOS 26 與 watchOS 26，帶來更沉浸、更個人化，也更實用的情緒與健康體驗。本次更新包括：

• 情緒收集罐煥新升級：新增更生動的物理效果，並加入星星、海洋貝殼、糖果等更多主題，讓每一份情緒都被溫柔收藏，更輕鬆關注自己的情緒變化。
• 支援自訂錶面主題與手機主畫面背景：自由打造專屬風格，還可以分享給好友，一起發現更有趣的表達方式。
• 支援更換 App 圖示：讓 AMood 更貼合你的審美與使用習慣。
• 健康習慣頁新增統計功能：記錄不止於打卡，幫助你更清晰地看見堅持帶來的變化。
• 支援自訂健康習慣：無論是作息、飲水還是運動，都能按自己的節奏靈活管理。
• 主頁身體指標新增趨勢分析：更直觀地瞭解身體狀態變化，幫助你更好地覺察日常節律。
• 睡眠視覺化進一步增強：新增入睡時間統計，以更直觀的方式幫助你瞭解睡眠習慣，逐步獲得更優質的睡眠。
• 健康習慣頁頂部互動優化：現已支援左右手勢快捷切換，操作更流暢、更順手。
• 整體互動體驗持續優化：多個細節改進與問題修復，帶來更穩定、更順暢的使用體驗。
hk.description:
歡迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好夥伴。無感追蹤你的心理狀態和身體壓力，快捷查看睡眠、基礎代謝、飲水、咖啡因攝入等健康指標，幫助你掌握身體動態，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何幫助到你

在這個快節奏的時代，我們常常像陀螺一樣不停旋轉，卻忽視了傾聽內心的聲音。疲憊與焦慮悄然襲來，卻難以言說原因。我們相信，了解身心狀態是每個人找到理想生活節奏的關鍵。AMood 正是秉持這一理念，透過更精準的分析，幫助你更好地照顧自己。例如：

- 當你忙於趕專案，連續工作數小時，軟體會透過手錶提醒你身體活力下降，泡杯熱茶，活動一下身體；

- 當你開完一整天的會議，感到焦慮不安時，軟體同樣會提醒你情緒指數偏低，讓你意識到需要暫時停下來，也許走出去曬曬太陽，散散步，都是不錯的選擇； 

- 早晨醒來感到鬱悶，打開軟體發現情緒指數偏低，原來昨晚的睡眠品質不佳。今天可能需要多曬曬太陽或者中午小睡一會，讓身心重新煥發光彩；

- 查看本週趨勢，發現每次與好友一起運動後，情緒指數都會明顯上揚。這或許是生活給我們的一個小提示：快樂往往藏在簡單的事物中；

- 當工作壓力大時，查看身心狀態日曆，尋找最適合自己的黃金時段。在對的時間做對的事，讓效率與健康齊頭並進。

◎ 核心功能

過去，壓力常透過單一的 HRV 指標衡量，但生活遠比數字複雜。AMood 首創雙維度分析，獨立監測身體壓力和心理狀態，幫助您更精準地識別身心變化，找到最適合的調節方式。

- 雙維監測：獨立追蹤身體活力與情緒波動，提供更精準的分析

- 全域數據：整合睡眠、心率、體溫、日照、步態等資訊，全面了解身體狀態

- 智慧提醒：即時監測身心狀態變化，適時提醒休息與調整

- 趨勢洞察：幫助您發現最佳作息與工作節奏

- 習慣養成：記錄運動、飲水、咖啡因攝入等行為，助力健康管理

- 聯名主題：多個 IP 正版授權，增添健康管理的樂趣與互動

AMood 不僅關注單一時刻，更致力於發現生活中的規律。透過分析睡眠、心率、體溫等多維數據，描繪出你獨特的生命韻律。每一組數據背後，都蘊藏著提升生活品質的秘密。因為我們深信，照顧自己這段旅程，理應充滿溫暖與愉悅。

◎ 蘋果健康整合

AMood 與 Apple Health 整合，需要授予蘋果健康的讀取和寫入權限。

◎ 訂閱價格和條款

我們提供一次性購買、按月和按年自動續訂三種不同的購買選項。按月或按年訂閱的說明：確認並支付後，將透過你的蘋果 iTunes 帳號自動續訂。扣費成功後，順延一個訂閱週期。若需退訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少24小時內，手動在 iTunes / Apple ID 設定管理中關閉自動續費功能。試用期內，如不取消訂閱，則會在試用期結束時自動開通訂閱並扣款。本服務由您自助選擇是否取消，若您選擇不取消，將為您開通下一個計費週期的續費服務。

◎ 隱私保護

使用者健康數據僅儲存在本地以及使用者所屬的iCloud中。

◎ 免責聲明

AMood不是醫療設備，不能用於診斷、治療、預防疾病或醫療狀況，所提供的所有資訊和建議不可以被視作醫療建議或診斷，請勿替代專業的診斷和治療。因此，如果您擔心自己的身體和(或)心理健康，請諮詢醫生。

《國語辭典》是基於教育部《重編國語辭典修訂本》的專業級電子辭典，收錄超過16萬筆詞條，涵蓋字詞、成語、典故、方言等豐富內容，是學習正體中文不可或缺的工具書。

核心特色
• 完整收錄教育部《重編國語辭典修訂本》
• 超過16萬筆詞條，涵蓋古今漢語
• 每詞條包含讀音、詞性、釋義、例句、字源
• 收錄大量成語、典故、俗語、方言
• 專業編審，確保內容準確性

智慧搜尋系統
• 拼音搜尋：支援漢語拼音模糊查詢
• 注音索引：完整注音符號索引
• 部首索引：傳統部首檢字法
• 筆畫查詢：依總筆畫數搜尋
• 詞語搜尋：直接輸入詞語查詢

貼心設計
• 完全離線使用，無需網路
• 夜間模式，保護視力
• 字體大小調整，閱讀舒適
• 快速複製與分享

個人學習管理
• 生字收藏功能，建立個人詞庫
• 查詢歷史記錄，方便回顧
• 每日推薦，持續擴充詞彙
• 學習統計，掌握進度

適用族群

主要用戶：
• 國高中教師備課參考
• 大學中文系師生
• 文字工作者、編輯、作家
• 海外華人學習正體中文
• 語言學研究者

mo.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

mo.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

mo.releaseNotes:
AMood 現已全面適配 iOS 26 與 watchOS 26，帶來更沉浸、更個人化，也更實用的情緒與健康體驗。本次更新包括：

• 情緒收集罐煥新升級：新增更生動的物理效果，並加入星星、海洋貝殼、糖果等更多主題，讓每一份情緒都被溫柔收藏，更輕鬆關注自己的情緒變化。
• 支援自訂錶面主題與手機主畫面背景：自由打造專屬風格，還可以分享給好友，一起發現更有趣的表達方式。
• 支援更換 App 圖示：讓 AMood 更貼合你的審美與使用習慣。
• 健康習慣頁新增統計功能：記錄不止於打卡，幫助你更清晰地看見堅持帶來的變化。
• 支援自訂健康習慣：無論是作息、飲水還是運動，都能按自己的節奏靈活管理。
• 主頁身體指標新增趨勢分析：更直觀地瞭解身體狀態變化，幫助你更好地覺察日常節律。
• 睡眠視覺化進一步增強：新增入睡時間統計，以更直觀的方式幫助你瞭解睡眠習慣，逐步獲得更優質的睡眠。
• 健康習慣頁頂部互動優化：現已支援左右手勢快捷切換，操作更流暢、更順手。
• 整體互動體驗持續優化：多個細節改進與問題修復，帶來更穩定、更順暢的使用體驗。
mo.description:
歡迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好夥伴。無感追蹤你的心理狀態和身體壓力，快捷查看睡眠、基礎代謝、飲水、咖啡因攝入等健康指標，幫助你掌握身體動態，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何幫助到你

在這個快節奏的時代，我們常常像陀螺一樣不停旋轉，卻忽視了傾聽內心的聲音。疲憊與焦慮悄然襲來，卻難以言說原因。我們相信，了解身心狀態是每個人找到理想生活節奏的關鍵。AMood 正是秉持這一理念，透過更精準的分析，幫助你更好地照顧自己。例如：

- 當你忙於趕專案，連續工作數小時，軟體會透過手錶提醒你身體活力下降，泡杯熱茶，活動一下身體；

- 當你開完一整天的會議，感到焦慮不安時，軟體同樣會提醒你情緒指數偏低，讓你意識到需要暫時停下來，也許走出去曬曬太陽，散散步，都是不錯的選擇； 

- 早晨醒來感到鬱悶，打開軟體發現情緒指數偏低，原來昨晚的睡眠品質不佳。今天可能需要多曬曬太陽或者中午小睡一會，讓身心重新煥發光彩；

- 查看本週趨勢，發現每次與好友一起運動後，情緒指數都會明顯上揚。這或許是生活給我們的一個小提示：快樂往往藏在簡單的事物中；

- 當工作壓力大時，查看身心狀態日曆，尋找最適合自己的黃金時段。在對的時間做對的事，讓效率與健康齊頭並進。

◎ 核心功能

過去，壓力常透過單一的 HRV 指標衡量，但生活遠比數字複雜。AMood 首創雙維度分析，獨立監測身體壓力和心理狀態，幫助您更精準地識別身心變化，找到最適合的調節方式。

- 雙維監測：獨立追蹤身體活力與情緒波動，提供更精準的分析

- 全域數據：整合睡眠、心率、體溫、日照、步態等資訊，全面了解身體狀態

- 智慧提醒：即時監測身心狀態變化，適時提醒休息與調整

- 趨勢洞察：幫助您發現最佳作息與工作節奏

- 習慣養成：記錄運動、飲水、咖啡因攝入等行為，助力健康管理

- 聯名主題：多個 IP 正版授權，增添健康管理的樂趣與互動

AMood 不僅關注單一時刻，更致力於發現生活中的規律。透過分析睡眠、心率、體溫等多維數據，描繪出你獨特的生命韻律。每一組數據背後，都蘊藏著提升生活品質的秘密。因為我們深信，照顧自己這段旅程，理應充滿溫暖與愉悅。

◎ 蘋果健康整合

AMood 與 Apple Health 整合，需要授予蘋果健康的讀取和寫入權限。

◎ 訂閱價格和條款

我們提供一次性購買、按月和按年自動續訂三種不同的購買選項。按月或按年訂閱的說明：確認並支付後，將透過你的蘋果 iTunes 帳號自動續訂。扣費成功後，順延一個訂閱週期。若需退訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少24小時內，手動在 iTunes / Apple ID 設定管理中關閉自動續費功能。試用期內，如不取消訂閱，則會在試用期結束時自動開通訂閱並扣款。本服務由您自助選擇是否取消，若您選擇不取消，將為您開通下一個計費週期的續費服務。

◎ 隱私保護

使用者健康數據僅儲存在本地以及使用者所屬的iCloud中。

◎ 免責聲明

AMood不是醫療設備，不能用於診斷、治療、預防疾病或醫療狀況，所提供的所有資訊和建議不可以被視作醫療建議或診斷，請勿替代專業的診斷和治療。因此，如果您擔心自己的身體和(或)心理健康，請諮詢醫生。

◎ 使用者協議和隱私條款

使用者協議 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隱私條款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

tw.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

tw.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

tw.releaseNotes:
AMood 現已全面適配 iOS 26 與 watchOS 26，帶來更沉浸、更個人化，也更實用的情緒與健康體驗。本次更新包括：

• 情緒收集罐煥新升級：新增更生動的物理效果，並加入星星、海洋貝殼、糖果等更多主題，讓每一份情緒都被溫柔收藏，更輕鬆關注自己的情緒變化。
• 支援自訂錶面主題與手機主畫面背景：自由打造專屬風格，還可以分享給好友，一起發現更有趣的表達方式。
• 支援更換 App 圖示：讓 AMood 更貼合你的審美與使用習慣。
• 健康習慣頁新增統計功能：記錄不止於打卡，幫助你更清晰地看見堅持帶來的變化。
• 支援自訂健康習慣：無論是作息、飲水還是運動，都能按自己的節奏靈活管理。
• 主頁身體指標新增趨勢分析：更直觀地瞭解身體狀態變化，幫助你更好地覺察日常節律。
• 睡眠視覺化進一步增強：新增入睡時間統計，以更直觀的方式幫助你瞭解睡眠習慣，逐步獲得更優質的睡眠。
• 健康習慣頁頂部互動優化：現已支援左右手勢快捷切換，操作更流暢、更順手。
• 整體互動體驗持續優化：多個細節改進與問題修復，帶來更穩定、更順暢的使用體驗。
tw.description:
歡迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好夥伴。無感追蹤你的心理狀態和身體壓力，快捷查看睡眠、基礎代謝、飲水、咖啡因攝入等健康指標，幫助你掌握身體動態，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何幫助到你

在這個快節奏的時代，我們常常像陀螺一樣不停旋轉，卻忽視了傾聽內心的聲音。疲憊與焦慮悄然襲來，卻難以言說原因。我們相信，了解身心狀態是每個人找到理想生活節奏的關鍵。AMood 正是秉持這一理念，透過更精準的分析，幫助你更好地照顧自己。例如：

- 當你忙於趕專案，連續工作數小時，軟體會透過手錶提醒你身體活力下降，泡杯熱茶，活動一下身體；

- 當你開完一整天的會議，感到焦慮不安時，軟體同樣會提醒你情緒指數偏低，讓你意識到需要暫時停下來，也許走出去曬曬太陽，散散步，都是不錯的選擇； 

- 早晨醒來感到鬱悶，打開軟體發現情緒指數偏低，原來昨晚的睡眠品質不佳。今天可能需要多曬曬太陽或者中午小睡一會，讓身心重新煥發光彩；

- 查看本週趨勢，發現每次與好友一起運動後，情緒指數都會明顯上揚。這或許是生活給我們的一個小提示：快樂往往藏在簡單的事物中；

- 當工作壓力大時，查看身心狀態日曆，尋找最適合自己的黃金時段。在對的時間做對的事，讓效率與健康齊頭並進。

◎ 核心功能

過去，壓力常透過單一的 HRV 指標衡量，但生活遠比數字複雜。AMood 首創雙維度分析，獨立監測身體壓力和心理狀態，幫助您更精準地識別身心變化，找到最適合的調節方式。

- 雙維監測：獨立追蹤身體活力與情緒波動，提供更精準的分析

- 全域數據：整合睡眠、心率、體溫、日照、步態等資訊，全面了解身體狀態

- 智慧提醒：即時監測身心狀態變化，適時提醒休息與調整

- 趨勢洞察：幫助您發現最佳作息與工作節奏

- 習慣養成：記錄運動、飲水、咖啡因攝入等行為，助力健康管理

- 聯名主題：多個 IP 正版授權，增添健康管理的樂趣與互動

AMood 不僅關注單一時刻，更致力於發現生活中的規律。透過分析睡眠、心率、體溫等多維數據，描繪出你獨特的生命韻律。每一組數據背後，都蘊藏著提升生活品質的秘密。因為我們深信，照顧自己這段旅程，理應充滿溫暖與愉悅。

◎ 蘋果健康整合

AMood 與 Apple Health 整合，需要授予蘋果健康的讀取和寫入權限。

◎ 訂閱價格和條款

我們提供一次性購買、按月和按年自動續訂三種不同的購買選項。按月或按年訂閱的說明：確認並支付後，將透過你的蘋果 iTunes 帳號自動續訂。扣費成功後，順延一個訂閱週期。若需退訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少24小時內，手動在 iTunes / Apple ID 設定管理中關閉自動續費功能。試用期內，如不取消訂閱，則會在試用期結束時自動開通訂閱並扣款。本服務由您自助選擇是否取消，若您選擇不取消，將為您開通下一個計費週期的續費服務。

◎ 隱私保護

使用者健康數據僅儲存在本地以及使用者所屬的iCloud中。

◎ 免責聲明

AMood不是醫療設備，不能用於診斷、治療、預防疾病或醫療狀況，所提供的所有資訊和建議不可以被視作醫療建議或診斷，請勿替代專業的診斷和治療。因此，如果您擔心自己的身體和(或)心理健康，請諮詢醫生。

◎ 使用者協議和隱私條款

使用者協議 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隱私條款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

tw.description:
《CAT QUEST II》是一個 2D 開放世界動作角色扮演遊戲，故事背景在一個貓和狗共同生活的幻想國度。生活在菲靈格的貓受到來自盧匹斯帝國的狗的攻擊，在戰爭持續的威脅下，《CAT QUEST II》講述了兩個國王的故事，他們被迫攜手合作並展開奇幻的發現之旅，目的是要奪回王位。
你可以獨自一人或與朋友一起扮演貓與狗的角色，探索他們的王國！ 探索一個充滿魔幻與奇異怪物的世界，並以前所未有的方式展開一次冒險！

隨著廣受好評的《CAT QUEST》的成功，開發商 Gentlebros 回到了菲靈格的世界，擴展了原始版本，提供了更多有趣的咒語、更多的武器選擇、令人興奮的新角色切換機制以及本地合作！
特色
- 菲靈格世界中的全新故事，還有更多！
- 全新的合作和切換遊戲玩法。你可以同時扮演貓和狗，也可以和朋友分別扮演貓和狗！
- 新的武器類型（大師之劍和魔杖等），成為一名強大的戰士！
- 更多咒語會給你的敵人帶來更多毛茸茸的判斷力。
- 新的被動技能，其屬性可以混合和組合，以實現無盡的可能性！
- 令人興奮的各色各樣的地下城充滿了新的陷阱和障礙，使每一次探險都有新鮮體驗！
- 參與各種支線任務，而每個支線任務都有一個完整的故事，豐富了《CAT QUEST》的傳說和國度！

立即開始終極的冒險之旅吧！

us.description:
*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!*

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time.

Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

FEATURES
• SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. 
• DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?
• CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE
• Revamped interface – exclusive mobile UI with complete touch control
• Game Center achievements
• Cloud Save – Share your progress between iOS devices
• Compatible with MFi controllers
• iPhone 16 Optimization (including Pro Max)

- iPhone Xr, iPhone SE Gen 2 (2020)
- iPad Mini Gen 5, iPad Air Gen 3, iPad Gen 8, iPad Gen 9

- iPhone Xs, iPhone Xs Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone SE Gen 3 (2022)

• Mood Collection Jar redesigned: Featuring more vivid physics effects and new themes including stars, ocean shells, candy, and more — so every emotion is gently preserved, making it easier to stay in touch with how you feel.
• Custom watch face themes and home screen wallpapers: Create your own unique style and share it with friends to discover more fun ways to express yourself.

us.description:
Welcome to AMood, your healthy living companion on Apple Watch. Effortlessly track your mental state and physical stress, quickly check sleep, basal metabolism, hydration, caffeine intake, and more — helping you stay in tune with your body and live a healthier life.

◎ How AMood Can Help You

In this fast-paced world, we often keep spinning without stopping to listen to ourselves. Fatigue and anxiety creep in quietly, yet we struggle to pinpoint why. We believe understanding your mind and body is the key to finding your ideal life rhythm. AMood was built on this belief — through precise analysis, it helps you take better care of yourself. For example:

- Busy rushing a project for hours? The app reminds you via your watch that energy is dropping — time for a tea break and a stretch;

- After a full day of meetings feeling anxious? It alerts you that your mood index is low — step outside for some sunshine and a walk; 

- Wake up feeling down? Open the app and discover poor sleep quality was the cause. A little more sunshine or a midday nap can help recharge;

- Check weekly trends and notice your mood rises after exercising with friends. Life's hint: happiness hides in simple things;

- Under high pressure? Check your mind-body calendar to find your golden hours. Do the right things at the right time — let productivity and health go hand in hand.

◎ Core Features

Stress used to be measured by a single HRV metric, but life is far more complex. AMood pioneered dual-dimension analysis, independently monitoring physical stress and mental state for more accurate insights.

- Dual-Dimension Monitoring: Independently tracks physical energy and emotional fluctuations for precise analysis

- Comprehensive Data: Integrates sleep, heart rate, body temperature, sunlight, gait, and more for a full health picture

- Smart Reminders: Real-time mind-body monitoring with timely reminders to rest and adjust

- Trend Insights: Discover your optimal routines and work rhythms

- Habit Building: Log exercise, hydration, caffeine intake, and more to support health management

- Licensed Themes: Multiple officially licensed IP collaborations, adding fun to health management

AMood goes beyond single moments — it uncovers patterns in your life. By analyzing sleep, heart rate, temperature, and more, it paints your unique life rhythm. Behind every data point lies the secret to a better life. We believe taking care of yourself should be filled with warmth and joy.

◎ Apple Health Integration

AMood integrates with Apple Health and requires read and write permissions.

◎ Subscription Pricing and Terms

We offer three options: one-time purchase, monthly auto-renewal, and annual auto-renewal. Subscriptions auto-renew through your Apple iTunes account after confirmation and payment. If not cancelled during the trial, the subscription activates and charges automatically at trial's end.

us.description:
Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files.

*** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses ***

Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents.

“Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com

“Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan:

- All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed).

Managed Configuration:

- Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool
- Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials)
- Control of which apps and services users can export documents to
- No ads

== KEY FEATURES == 

Smart Scanning:

- Document detection & background removal
- Distortion correction
- Shadow removal and defect cleanup
- Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo)
- Batch scanning

PDF Creation & Editing:

- Document merging & splitting
- Multiple page PDF creation
- Photos and PDF import

Security & Privacy:

- On-device document processing
+ Face ID locking
+ PDF password encryption

Document Organization:

- Document tagging
- Metadata and content search
+ Smart document renaming (custom templates, …)
+ Backup and multi-device sync with Genius Cloud (separate subscription)

Export:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.

+ Automatic background auto-export

OCR (Text Recognition):

+ Text extraction
+ Searchable PDF creation
+ Business card scanning & contact creation

== ABOUT US ==

It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. We take pride in crafting apps that help millions of users throughout the world and hold ourselves to the highest standards in terms of quality and privacy. Get in touch with us @thegrizzlylabs if you have any questions.

tr.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. • SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. 
• DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?

tr.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
tr.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

tr.description:
Enjoy this former Apple Arcade game, now on the App Store.

CAT QUEST II is a 2D open-world action-RPG set in a fantasy realm of cats and dogs. Under threat from a continuing war between the cats of Felingard and the advancing dogs of the Lupus Empire, CAT QUEST II tells the tail of two kings, brought together against their will, on a journey of paw-some discovery to reclaim their thrones.
Play as both a cat and dog as you explore their kingdoms solo or with a friend! Quest in a world filled with magic, curious monsters, and go on a catventure like never before!

Following the success of the acclaimed CAT QUEST, developers The Gentlebros return to the world of Felingard to expand on the original with more explosive spells, expanded weapon options, an exciting new character switch mechanic, and local co-op!
Features
- Brand new story set in the world of Felingard - and beyond!
- All new switch and co-op gameplay. Play as both cat and dog, either alone or with a friend!
- New weapons types – Master swords, staves and more to become a fur-midable fighter!
- More spells bring even more furry judgement to your foes.
- New passive abilities, whose attributes can be mixed and combined for endless paw-sibilities!
- Exciting, and varied dungeons filled with new traps and obstacles, making every pounce into the unknown a fresh experience!
- Em-bark on a litany of side quests, each telling its own story and expanding the lore and universe of CAT QUEST!

Go on the ultimutt catventure today!

tr.description:
Step into the exciting world of farming with Farming Simulator 20! Harvest many different crops, tend to your livestock of pigs, cows, and sheep, and now ride your own horses, letting you explore the vast land around your farm in a brand-new way. Sell your products in a dynamic market to earn money which you can invest in additional machinery and the expansion of your farm.

In Farming Simulator 20 you take control of over 100 vehicles and tools faithfully recreated from leading brands in the industry. For the first time on mobile platforms this includes John Deere, the largest agriculture machinery company in the world. Drive other famous farming brands such as Case IH, New Holland, Challenger, Fendt, Massey Ferguson, Valtra, Krone, Deutz-Fahr and many more.

Farming Simulator 20 features a new North American environment in which to develop and expand your farm. Enjoy many exciting farming activities, including new machinery and crops with cotton and oats. 


Features of Farming Simulator 20 include:

• Use over 100 realistic vehicles and tools from some of the biggest agriculture machine makers
• Plant and harvest different crops: Wheat, barley, oat, canola, sunflowers, soybean, corn, potatoes, sugar beet and cotton
• Feed your cows and sheep to produce and sell milk and wool
• Take care of horses and ride on them to freely explore the world around your farm
• New 3D graphics show even more detail on your machinery and the Northern American environment
• Cockpit view lets you drive in your vehicles in an even more realistic way than before

Desenvolvido para instituições, profissionais e alunos que buscam otimizar as manobras de RCP durante uma PCR. O timer foi elaborado e amplamente testado para ter um layout prático, rápido e intuitivo, mesmo no cenário agitado e de elevado estresse de uma PCR.
 
Funções:
- 2 CHRONÔMETROS: timer com 2 relógios distintos para COMPRESSÕES TORÁCICAS e EPINEFRINA, com feedback visual amplo quando excedidos os limites de tempo 
- CUSTOMIZÁVEL: permite adicionar medicamentos, procedimentos e ritmos da sua escolha, separados por categorias
- MÚLTIPLOS AJUSTES disponíveis para o Code Blue se adequar às suas preferências
- MODO FIRST RESPONDER: para aqueles que prestam primeiro atendimento em ambiente extra-hospitalar, opção para salvar as coordenadas dos atendimentos e visualizar no mapa interativa. 
- FLUXOGRAMAS: fluxogramas interativas com as recomendações presentes nos principais guidelines para RCP / PCR do AHA ACLS e ERC. 
- LOG/TIMELINE: resumo prontamente disponível em layout de fácil visualização acessível durante a ocorrência, permitindo manter total controle mesmo em uma PCR complexa de longa duração
- HISTÓRICO: histórico de atendimentos com resumo e indicadores de qualidade de assistência, permitindo revisão e aprimoramento dos atendimentos por equipes e seus gestores

Subnautica é um jogo de aventura subaquática ambientado em um planeta oceânico alienígena. Um mundo aberto enorme repleto de maravilhas e perigos está à sua espera!

Mergulhe nas profundezas, fabrique equipamentos, pilote submarinos e supere a vida selvagem para explorar recifes de corais, vulcões, sistemas de cavernas e muito mais — tudo enquanto tenta sobreviver. Desvende o mistério deste mundo repleto de criaturas, tanto amigáveis quanto hostis, com pistas de uma era passada.

Jogue no modo de sobrevivência e vivencie o desafio original ou troque para o modo de liberdade ou criativo para explorar o planeta oceânico sem a pressão da sede, da fome ou do oxigênio.

• EXPLORE — Gerencie fome, sede e fornecimento de oxigênio conforme mergulha nas enormes florestas de alga, nos planaltos iluminados pelo sol, nos recifes bioluminescentes e sistemas de caverna enormes.
• SUCATEIE — Colete recursos do oceano à sua volta. Aventure-se ainda mais nas profundezas para encontrar recursos mais raros, permitindo a fabricação de itens avançados.

pt.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

• 支持自定义表盘主题与手机主屏背景：自由打造专属风格，还可以分享给好友，一起发现更有趣的表达方式。
• 支持更换 App 图标：让 AMood 更贴合你的审美与使用习惯。
• 健康习惯页新增统计功能：记录不止于打卡，帮助你更清晰地看见坚持带来的变化。
• 支持自定义健康习惯：无论是作息、饮水还是运动，都能按自己的节奏灵活管理。
• 主页身体指标新增趋势分析：更直观地了解身体状态变化，帮助你更好地觉察日常节律。
• 睡眠可视化进一步增强：新增入睡时间统计，以更直观的方式帮助你了解睡眠习惯，逐步获得更优质的睡眠。
• 健康习惯页顶部交互优化：现已支持左右手势快捷切换，操作更流畅、更顺手。

pt.description:
欢迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好伙伴。无感追踪你的心理状态和身体压力，快捷查看睡眠、基础代谢、饮水、咖啡因摄入等健康指标，帮助你掌握身体动态，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何帮助到你

在这个快节奏的时代，我们常常像陀螺一样不停旋转，却忽视了倾听内心的声音。疲惫与焦虑悄然袭来，却难以言说原因。我们相信，了解身心状态是每个人找到理想生活节奏的关键。AMood 正是秉持这一理念，通过更精准的分析，帮助你更好地照顾自己。例如：

- 当你忙于赶项目，连续工作数小时，软件会通过手表提醒你身体活力下降，泡杯热茶，活动一下身体；

- 当你开完一整天的会议，感到焦虑不安时，软件同样会提醒你情绪指数偏低，让你意识到需要暂时停下来，也许走出去晒晒太阳，散散步，都是不错的选择； 

- 早晨醒来感到郁闷，打开软件发现情绪指数偏低，原来昨晚的睡眠质量不佳。今天可能需要多晒晒太阳或者中午小睡一会，让身心重新焕发光彩；

- 查看本周趋势，发现每次与好友一起运动后，情绪指数都会明显上扬。这或许是生活给我们的一个小提示：快乐往往藏在简单的事物中；

- 当工作压力大时，查看身心状态日历，寻找最适合自己的黄金时段。在对的时间做对的事，让效率与健康齐头并进。

◎ 核心功能

过去，压力常通过单一的 HRV 指标衡量，但生活远比数字复杂。AMood 首创双维度分析，独立监测身体压力和心理状态，帮助您更精准地识别身心变化，找到最适合的调节方式。

- 双维监测：独立追踪身体活力与情绪波动，提供更精准的分析

- 全域数据：整合睡眠、心率、体温、日照、步态等信息，全面了解身体状态

- 智能提醒：实时监测身心状态变化，适时提醒休息与调整

- 趋势洞察：帮助您发现最佳作息与工作节奏

- 习惯养成：记录运动、饮水、咖啡因摄入等行为，助力健康管理

- 联名主题：多个 IP 正版授权，增添健康管理的乐趣与互动

AMood 不仅关注单一时刻，更致力于发现生活中的规律。通过分析睡眠、心率、体温等多维数据，描绘出你独特的生命韵律。每一组数据背后，都蕴藏着提升生活品质的秘密。因为我们深信，照顾自己这段旅程，理应充满温暖与愉悦。

◎ 苹果健康集成

AMood 与 Apple Health 集成，需要授予苹果健康的读取和写入权限。

◎ 订阅价格和条款

我们提供一次性购买、按月和按年自动续订三种不同的购买选项。按月或按年订阅的说明：确认并支付后，将通过你的苹果 iTunes 账号自动续订。扣费成功后，顺延一个订阅周期。若需退订，请在当前订阅期结束前至少24小时内，手动在 iTunes / Apple ID 设置管理中关闭自动续费功能。试用期内，如不取消订阅，则会在试用期结束时自动开通订阅并扣款。本服务由您自助选择是否取消，若您选择不取消，将为您开通下一个计费周期的续费服务。

◎ 隐私保护

用户健康数据仅储存在本地以及用户所属的iCloud中。

◎ 免责声明

AMood不是医疗设备，不能用于诊断、治疗、预防疾病或医疗状况，所提供的所有信息和建议不可以被视作医疗建议或诊断，请勿替代专业的诊断和治疗。因此，如果您担心自己的身体和(或)心理健康，请咨询医生。

◎ 用户协议和隐私条款

用户协议 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隐私条款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

pt.description:
O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas.

*** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas ***

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

pt.description:
CAT QUEST II é um RPG de ação de mundo aberto 2D em um reino fantástico de cães e gatos. Sob a ameaça de uma guerra contínua entre os gatos de Felingard e as forças do Império de Lupus, CAT QUEST II conta a história de dois reis, unidos contra suas vontades, em uma jornada repleta de descobertas miauravilhosas para reclamar seus tronos.
Jogue como cão e gato e explore os reinos sozinho ou com seus amigos! Aventure-se em um mundo repleto de magia e monstros esquisitos e embarque nessa miauventura única!

Com o sucesso do aclamado CAT QUEST, os Gentlebros voltam ao mundo de Felingard para superar a experiência do primeiro jogo, com mais magias explosivas, opções de armas mais abrangentes, uma mecânica de alternância de personagens fantástica e modo cooperativo local!
Experimente
- Uma história inédita no mundo de Felingard — e novos locais!
- Novas mecânicas de alternância e cooperação. Jogue como gato e cão, sozinho ou com seus amigos!
- Novos tipos de armas – Torne-se um mestre de espadas, cajados e muito mais e seja um guerreiro foformidável!
- Mais magias para miaussacrar seus inimigos.
- Novas habilidades passivas, com atributos que podem ser misturados e combinados em possibilidades infinitas!
- Masmorras emocionantes e diversificadas com novas armadilhas e obstáculos, garantindo que cada aventura seja cheia de descobertas inéditas!
- Embarque em inumeráveis missões secundárias, cada uma com sua história única que expande o universo e a mitologia de CAT QUEST!

Comece hoje sua grandiosa miauventura!

pt.description:
"Entra no mundo empolgante da agricultura com o Farming Simulator 20! Colhe muitas colheitas diferentes, trata do teu gado constituído por porcos, vacas e ovelhas, e cavalga nos teus cavalos, o que te permitirá explorar a imensa terra à volta da tua quinta de forma inédita. Vende os teus produtos num mercado dinâmico para ganhares dinheiro que poderás investir em maquinaria e na expansão da tua quinta.

No Farming Simulator 20, controlas mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas criados fielmente das marcas líderes do mercado. Pela primeira vez nas plataformas móveis, terás à disposição a John Deere, a maior empresa de maquinaria agrícola do mundo. Trabalha com outras marcas famosas como a Case IH, a New Holland, a Challenger, a Fendt, a Massey Ferguson, a Valtra, a Krone, a Deutz-Fahr e muito mais.

O Farming Simulator 20 apresenta um novo ambiente norte-americano, onde poderás desenvolver e expandir a tua quinta. Desfruta de muitas atividades agrícolas empolgantes, incluindo novas máquinas e colheitas, como o algodão e a aveia.


O Farming Simulator 20 vem com os seguintes recursos:

• Usa mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas realistas de alguns dos maiores fabricantes agrícolas
• Semeia e colhe colheitas diferentes: trigo, cevada, aveia, canola, girassol, soja, milho, batata, beterraba-sacarina e algodão
• Alimenta as tuas vacas e ovelhas para produzires e venderes leite e lã
• Cuida dos teus cavalos e monta neles para explorares livremente o mundo à volta da tua quinta
• Novos gráficos 3D exibem ainda mais detalhes das tuas máquinas e do ambiente norte-americano.
• A vista da cabina permite-te conduzir os teus veículos de uma forma ainda mais realista do que dantes"
